overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The clip transitions from a bright sunlit urban street into a covered market area with hanging red lanterns and dense vendor stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with commercial storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit sidewalk following a pedestrian in a cowboy hat, passing by futuristic glass buildings and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a cowboy hat and vest walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: tall curved glass and steel building with multiple floors and blue-tinted windows
large floating digital advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
row of commercial shops with awnings and neon signage including an OPEN sign
green metal barrier separating sidewalk from the street
large palm tree in a white planter box on the sidewalk
industrial vent releasing white steam into the air

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunlit futuristic city street with tall glass buildings and neon advertisements. The camera follows a pedestrian in a cowboy hat along a concrete sidewalk lined with storefronts and metal railings. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the same direction as the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market entrance with stairway descent

events.description: exits bright outdoor street and enters covered market archway
begins descending concrete stairs into lower market level

agents.ego_description: entering the covered market structure and descending stairs into a lower level with hanging red lanterns

entered.detail: large concrete entranceway leading into the covered market area
wide stairs descending into the lower market level with worn concrete texture
traditional red spherical lanterns hanging on wires across the market ceiling
purple neon sign reading HOTEL on a blue building facade
green canvas awning covering a market stall

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the bright outdoor street into a covered market entrance, descending a concrete staircase. Red paper lanterns hang overhead and a neon HOTEL sign becomes visible on the right. The lighting shifts from natural sunlight to a dimmer mixed environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense indoor market with food stalls and vendors

events.description: passes an NPC lying on the ground among scattered debris near market stalls

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow market pathways past various vendor stalls, shoppers, and a person lying on the ground

notable_agents.action: tattooed woman with glowing red neck implants standing near a stall drinking from a cup

entered.detail: wooden market stall with green canvas canopy and various goods displayed
small blue mobile food vendor cart with yellow trim
rustic wooden stall structure with shelves and boxes
bright red automated vending machine with glowing interior

segments.scene_description: The camera explores a dense indoor market filled with vendor stalls, food carts, and neon signage. Steam rises from cooking areas and red paper lanterns hang overhead. The pathway narrows between wooden stalls and various NPCs browse goods or stand around. Near the end, the camera passes a tattooed woman with glowing implants drinking near a red vending machine.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sunlit futuristic thoroughfare into the dim, atmospheric depths of a covered urban market. It begins on a concrete sidewalk lined with glass buildings and neon advertisements, following a pedestrian in a cowboy hat through sparse traffic. As the camera descends a concrete staircase, the natural sunlight fades, giving way to a mixed-light environment marked by a neon hotel sign and hanging red paper lanterns. The scene then expands into a dense indoor bazaar where the pathway narrows between steaming food carts and wooden vendor stalls. Finally, the camera weaves through browsing NPCs before passing a tattooed woman with glowing implants standing beside a red vending machine.
